selfTests: pnpm --filter @fxl-sales/web test src/auth/__tests__/claims.test.ts (PASS), pnpm --filter @fxl-sales/web test src/auth/__tests__/token.test.ts (PASS), pnpm --filter @fxl-sales/web type-check (PASS)
summary: Fixed parseJwtPayload to decode base64 JWT payload bytes as UTF-8 via TextDecoder instead of Latin-1 atob, and DRYed readJwtExpiry in token.ts to reuse parseJwtPayload.
